name: ESBT Interest Expense Deduction

eligibility.description: Available to trusts that have made an ESBT election and carry debt used to purchase S corporation shares.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an Electing Small Business Trust (ESBT) to deduct interest expense paid or accrued on indebtedness incurred to acquire stock in an S corporation.
